corrections.note: Printed form has rough breathing: ηὐφράνθη.
Body reads ἐτηρείδετο; transcript has ἐπηρείδετο, likely influenced by apparatus.

notes: Running head matches. Apparatus appears correctly transcribed. Body mostly correct; one clear body word misread at XV D 1. Breathing on ηὐφράνθη is visible and can be corrected conservatively.
